content_summary: This Swift file is part of the FingerprintJS library and is responsible for storing and retrieving identifiers in the iOS Keychain. The KeychainIdentifierStorage class provides methods to store and load identifiers, which are stored as strings in the keychain. The class uses the SecItemCopyMatching and SecItemAdd functions from the Security framework to interact with the keychain.
fingerprint_contribution: This file contributes to the final device fingerprint by storing and retrieving unique identifiers that can be used to identify a device. The identifiers are stored in the keychain, which provides a secure way to store sensitive data. The stored identifiers can then be used to generate a device fingerprint, which can be used to track a device across different sessions and applications.
